Docs Pricing

Semantic Browser Coverage

This fixture checks that read() extracts the main article text, headings, visible links, tables, language metadata, canonical URLs, descriptions, and Open Graph metadata without relying on screenshots.

Controls Under Test

Agents should prefer page meaning and structured content over pixels. Screenshots are useful only for visual fallback cases such as charts, canvases, maps, dense screenshots, and image-heavy pages.

Read the CDP architecture notes and compare them with the ARIA reference.

Coverage Table

Quarterly browser coverage
AreaStatusOwner
Accessibility treeRequireddaemon
Stable refsRequiredstore
Visual fallbackFallbackscreenshots

Fixture footer.
